# pfsense_dnsresolver_advanced (Data Source)

Retrieves the [DNS resolver (Unbound)](https://docs.netgate.com/pfsense/en/latest/services/dns/resolver.html) advanced settings configuration.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `aggressive_nsec` (Boolean) Use aggressive NSEC/NSEC3 to synthesize NXDOMAIN and NODATA responses. Defaults to 'false'.
- `cache_max_ttl` (String) Maximum time to live (seconds) for RRsets and messages in the cache. Defaults to '86400'.
- `cache_min_ttl` (String) Minimum time to live (seconds) for RRsets and messages in the cache. Defaults to '0'.
- `disable_auto_access_control` (Boolean) Disable the automatic addition of access control entries based on listening interfaces. Defaults to 'false'.
- `disable_auto_host_entries` (Boolean) Disable the automatic addition of host entries for the system hostname and configured interfaces. Defaults to 'false'.
- `dns64` (Boolean) Enable DNS64 support. Defaults to 'false'.
- `dns64_netbits` (String) DNS64 prefix netbits.
- `dns64_prefix` (String) DNS64 prefix (e.g., '64:ff9b::/96').
- `dns_record_cache` (Boolean) Serve DNS records from the cache even if they have expired. Defaults to 'false'.
- `dnssec_stripped` (Boolean) Harden DNSSEC data — require DNSSEC data for trust-anchored zones. Defaults to 'false'.
- `edns_buffer_size` (String) EDNS reassembly buffer size in bytes. Defaults to 'auto'.
- `hide_identity` (Boolean) Hide the identity (hostname) of the DNS resolver from queries. Defaults to 'false'.
- `hide_version` (Boolean) Hide the version of the DNS resolver from queries. Defaults to 'false'.
- `incoming_num_tcp` (String) Number of incoming TCP buffers per thread. Defaults to '10'.
- `infra_cache_num_hosts` (String) Number of infrastructure hosts for which information is cached. Defaults to '10000'.
- `infra_host_ttl` (String) Time to live (seconds) for entries in the infrastructure host cache. Defaults to '900'.
- `infra_keep_probing` (Boolean) Keep probing infrastructure hosts that are down. Defaults to 'false'.
- `jostle_timeout` (String) Timeout in milliseconds used when the server is very busy. Defaults to '200'.
- `log_verbosity` (String) Log verbosity level (0-5). Defaults to '1'.
- `msg_cache_size` (String) Message cache size in MB. Defaults to '4'.
- `num_queries_per_thread` (String) Number of queries that every thread will service simultaneously. Defaults to '512'.
- `outgoing_num_tcp` (String) Number of outgoing TCP buffers per thread. Defaults to '10'.
- `prefetch` (Boolean) Prefetch DNS cache entries before they expire. Defaults to 'false'.
- `prefetch_key` (Boolean) Prefetch DNSSEC keys earlier in the validation process. Defaults to 'false'.
- `qname_minimisation` (Boolean) Send minimum amount of information to upstream servers to enhance privacy. Defaults to 'false'.
- `qname_minimisation_strict` (Boolean) Do not fall back to sending full QNAME to upstream servers. Defaults to 'false'.
- `sock_queue_timeout` (String) Socket queue timeout in seconds. Defaults to '0'.
- `unwanted_reply_threshold` (String) Total number of unwanted replies to keep track of in every thread. Defaults to 'disabled'.
- `use_caps` (Boolean) Use 0x20-encoded random bits in the DNS query to foil spoof attempts. Defaults to 'false'.
